description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the hexpm/elixir:1.18.3-erlang-27.3.4-ubuntu-focal-20250404 Docker image, caches the directories _build/*/lib, deps, and assets/node_modules, and runs on runners tagged saas-linux-small-amd64. Define three stages (test, pages, release) and add a test job in the test stage that executes apt-get update, apt-get -y install git, apt-get -y install build-essential, mix local.hex --force, mix local.rebar --force, mix deps.get, then mix compile and mix test, uses the postgres:latest service, and sets the variables MIX_ENV=ci, POSTGRES_DB=code_stats_ci, POSTGRES_USER=postgres, POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres. Add a pages job in the pages stage that runs the same before‑script steps, then mix docs and mv doc public, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the trunk@code-stats/code-stats branch. Add a release job in the release stage that runs apt-get update, apt-get -y install git, apt-get -y install build-essential curl, installs Node.js via curl https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash and apt-get -yq install nodejs, runs npm ci in the assets folder, then mix compile --force, mix frontend.build, mix phx.digest, and mix release --overwrite, sets MINIFY=true and MIX_ENV=prod, stores the generated _build/prod/code_stats-*.tar.gz as an artifact, and also only runs on the trunk@code-stats/code-stats branch.
